flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Collin County Community College District rose 71% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.6k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Collin County Community College District rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.1k → $6.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Collin County Community College District rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.7k → $2.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Collin County Community College District rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (16.2% → 20.3%).
